name: @vahan360/worker-ingest
description: BullMQ ingest worker for Vahan360 scrape jobs.

scripts.build: node --check src/telemetry.js && node --check src/lib/activeTraceLogFields.js && node --check src/lib/runWithJobTraceContext.js && node --check src/lib/workerMetrics.js && node --check src/lib/selectorHealthMonitor.js && node --check src/lib/browserManagerClient.js && node --check src/persistJobArtifacts.js && node --check src/browserManagerServer.js && node --check src/index.js && node --check src/lib/logger.js
